mapper.select: SELECT project_id AS "projectId", project_name AS "projectName", location AS "location", description AS "description", camera_url AS "cameraUrl", status AS "status", TO_CHAR(created_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS "createdAt" FROM safe_project ORDER BY created_at ASC

SELECT project_id AS "projectId", project_name AS "projectName", location AS "location", description AS "description", camera_url AS "cameraUrl", status AS "status", TO_CHAR(created_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS "createdAt" FROM safe_project WHERE project_id = #{projectId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO safe_project (project_id, project_name, location, description, camera_url, status) VALUES (#{projectId}, #{projectName}, #{location}, #{description}, #{cameraUrl}, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE safe_project SET project_name = #{projectName}, location = #{location}, description = #{description}, camera_url = #{cameraUrl}, status = #{status}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE project_id = #{projectId}
